commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adjusts npm install/update helpers to choose and propagate freshness-bypass config for managed OpenClaw package and plugin installs, adds regression tests, and records a changelog fix.

Reproducibility: yes. from source and the npm 11 contract. npm exits when `before` and `min-release-age` are both present, and the PR can route different bypass modes into the same staged global update command.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blocker is a narrow freshness-mode mismatch between global install argv and env that can be repaired with focused tests.

target.title: fix: bypass npm freshness for managed installs
target.body:
## What
Makes OpenClaw-managed npm package and plugin installs bypass npm freshness filters without tripping npm's mutually exclusive `before` / `min-release-age` config checks.

## Why
The 2026.5.18 core update could install the core package while plugin package installs failed when user npm config hid freshly published package versions behind a stale `before` date or `min-release-age` quarantine.

## Changes
- Detect raw npmrc freshness keys
- Prefer compatible bypass mode
- Neutralize parent freshness env
- Pass command npm config scope
- Add changelog entry

## Testing
Behavior addressed: managed npm installs can see freshly published OpenClaw plugin packages when npm freshness policy is configured.
Real environment tested: local macOS Node 24/npm 11, Docker `node:24-bookworm` npm 11.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `pnpm test src/infra/npm-install-env.test.ts src/infra/safe-package-install.test.ts src/infra/install-source-utils.test.ts src/infra/update-global.test.ts src/infra/update-runner.test.ts src/plugins/install.npm-spec.test.ts src/plugins/uninstall.test.ts src/plugins/git-install.test.ts src/infra/npm-managed-root.test.ts src/infra/install-package-dir.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`; `pnpm check:changed`; Docker stale `before`, user `min-release-age`, project `min-release-age`, project `before`, and parent-env freshness installs for `@openclaw/codex@2026.5.18`; `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode auto --reviewer codex --fallback-reviewer none`.
Evidence after fix: focused tests passed 239 tests; `pnpm check:changed` passed; Docker installed and printed `2026.5.18` for the freshness scenarios; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.
Observed result after fix: `node_modules/@openclaw/codex` was created despite freshness policies that previously hid the version.
What was not tested: full release CI and cross-platform Crabbox/Testbox install lanes.
target.author: jalehman
